meaning: vt.逃避,逃跑,逃走vi.消散,逃,消失
examples: He was caught trying to flee the country.
For an instant, Barney was tempted to flee.
Many refugees have been forced to flee their homeland.
The legend is that Veronica and Zaccheus had to flee Palestine and ended up here.
Coalition forces are engaging groups of enemy and paramilitary forces as they flee the city.
